name: Bot Application Layer
description: Core bot setup, CLI dispatcher, command routing, package entry point, shared utilities, and hook installation subcommand

name: Message Processing Layer
description: MarkdownV2 formatting and escaping, Telegram message splitting and sending with safe fallback helpers

name: Session & State Layer
description: Session lifecycle management, JSONL transcript parsing, state persistence, and monitor state tracking

name: Terminal & Tmux Layer
description: Tmux window management, terminal pane parsing, and terminal-to-PNG screenshot rendering

name: Transcription Layer
description: Voice message to text transcription via speech recognition

name: Handler Layer
description: Interactive UI components, inline keyboards, message queue with per-user FIFO worker, pagination, cleanup, status polling, callback data constants, and message send/edit helpers

name: Configuration Layer
description: Environment variable templates and Python project metadata / dependency configuration

name: Documentation Layer
description: Project READMEs in multiple languages, agent instructions, architecture rules, feature docs, protocol reverse-engineering docs, and font licenses

name: Infrastructure Layer
description: CI/CD workflows for linting, type checking, PR review, and deployment scripts
